creator: john@saltant.com
text: @demon: It seems to me that the use case is just as real for uwsgi as it is for any python-based port, and more real than many because uwsgi is expressly designed to host multiple concurrent apps though rc profiles. However, I recognize the difficulty in implementing this since the "concurrent" machinery does not extend to the rc script and uwsgi is evidently in a vanishingly small minority in benefitting from such an arrangement. It's probably best to resolve this by removing the broken support for concurrent installations, and perhaps to revisit it when circumstances change.
